core_query_plans.name: symbol_query_exact_name
core_query_plans.sql: SELECT e.id_key FROM entities e WHERE e.name_id = (SELECT name_id FROM entities ORDER BY id_key LIMIT 1) ORDER BY e.id_key LIMIT 20

explain_query_plan.detail: SEARCH e USING COVERING INDEX idx_entities_name (name_id=?)

core_query_plans.name: text_query_fts
core_query_plans.default_workflow: query text / query files / symbol FTS fallback
core_query_plans.sql: SELECT rowid, kind, id, repo_relative_path, line, title, body, bm25(stage0_fts) AS rank FROM stage0_fts WHERE stage0_fts MATCH 'login' ORDER BY rank LIMIT 20

explain_query_plan.detail: USE TEMP B-TREE FOR ORDER BY

core_query_plans.name: relation_query_calls
core_query_plans.sql: SELECT e.id_key FROM edges e WHERE e.relation_id = (SELECT id FROM relation_kind_dict WHERE value = 'CALLS') ORDER BY e.id_key LIMIT 20

explain_query_plan.detail: SEARCH relation_kind_dict USING COVERING INDEX sqlite_autoindex_relation_kind_dict_1 (value=?)

core_query_plans.name: context_pack_outbound
core_query_plans.default_workflow: context-pack proof path expansion from a seed
core_query_plans.sql: SELECT e.id_key FROM edges e WHERE e.head_id_key = (SELECT head_id_key FROM edges ORDER BY id_key LIMIT 1) AND e.relation_id = (SELECT relation_id FROM edges ORDER BY id_key LIMIT 1) ORDER BY e.id_key LIMIT 64

explain_query_plan.detail: SEARCH e USING COVERING INDEX idx_edges_head_relation (head_id_key=? AND relation_id=?)

core_query_plans.name: impact_inbound
core_query_plans.sql: SELECT e.id_key FROM edges e WHERE e.tail_id_key = (SELECT tail_id_key FROM edges ORDER BY id_key LIMIT 1) AND e.relation_id = (SELECT relation_id FROM edges ORDER BY id_key LIMIT 1) ORDER BY e.id_key LIMIT 64

explain_query_plan.detail: SEARCH e USING COVERING INDEX idx_edges_tail_relation (tail_id_key=? AND relation_id=?)

core_query_plans.name: unresolved_calls_paginated
core_query_plans.sql: SELECT e.id_key FROM edges_compat e JOIN exactness_dict exactness ON exactness.id = e.exactness_id JOIN entities tail ON tail.id_key = e.tail_id_key JOIN symbol_dict tail_name ON tail_name.id = tail.name_id JOIN qualified_name_lookup tail_qname ON tail_qname.id = tail.qualified_name_id JOIN extractor_dict tail_extractor ON tail_extractor.id = tail.created_from_id WHERE e.relation_id = (SELECT id FROM relation_kind_dict WHERE value = 'CALLS') AND (exactness.value = 'static_heuristic' OR (e.flags_bitset & 2) != 0 OR lower(COALESCE(tail.metadata_json, '')) LIKE '%unresolved%' OR lower(tail_extractor.value) LIKE '%heuristic%' OR lower(tail_name.value) LIKE '%unknown_callee%' OR tail_qname.value LIKE 'static_reference:%') ORDER BY e.id_key LIMIT 20 OFFSET 0

explain_query_plan.detail: SEARCH relation_kind_dict USING COVERING INDEX sqlite_autoindex_relation_kind_dict_1 (value=?)
SEARCH tail_name USING INTEGER PRIMARY KEY (rowid=?)
SEARCH exactness USING INTEGER PRIMARY KEY (rowid=?)
SEARCH tail_extractor USING INTEGER PRIMARY KEY (rowid=?)
SEARCH qname USING INTEGER PRIMARY KEY (rowid=?)
SEARCH prefix USING INTEGER PRIMARY KEY (rowid=?)
SEARCH suffix USING INTEGER PRIMARY KEY (rowid=?)

vacuum_analyze_measurement.reason: This phase is audit-only; measure VACUUM/ANALYZE on a copied DB before changing production artifacts.

notes: Read-only audit: no VACUUM, ANALYZE, index drop, or storage rewrite was applied.
dbstat byte totals include SQLite b-tree pages and FTS shadow objects when available.
